architectReview.evidence: Architect review 85-G001ArchitectClear approved G001 with CLEAR architecture/product/code and zero blockers. Review confirmed all status displays route through HqStatusBadge, /api/hq/status remains authoritative, PerformanceRecorder dispatches requestHqStatusRefresh immediately after successful performance-log POST, weekly-summary refresh failure is isolated, stale static copies are absent, and performance spec/docs align around content_package selector plus five metric fields.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA/red-team 86-G001QaClear passed all contract coverage, surface evidence, and adversarial cases with zero blockers using leader verification receipts. Leader verification passed focused Biome, focused G001/P4 contract tests, full npm test, typecheck, Prisma validate, and production audit. QA confirmed live status label, live needs_performance_log count, AI budget display, loading/error states, stale-copy absence, refresh after successful performance POST even when weekly summary refresh fails, and doc/spec alignment.

artifactRefs.description: G001 focused and full verification receipts, review refs, contract coverage, and adversarial notes.
Browser automation attempt and platform-unavailable transcript for the G001 web surface.
Non-uniform PNG visual fallback artifact representing the G001 web status badge surface when Chromium automation dependencies are unavailable.

contractCoverage.contractRef: docs/planning/06-screens.md status header and docs/planning/06-tasks.md P4 status API contract
contractCoverage.obligation: Display current HQ status from authoritative backend data instead of static page copy.
Render current needs_performance_log count on HQ/header/performance surfaces and refresh it after performance logs are saved.
Expose AI budget usage from hq_status.ai_budget without hardcoded placeholder text.
Keep the performance screen contract aligned with the implementation: content package selector plus five metric fields.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Browser automation was attempted for http://127.0.0.1:3100/login but Chromium could not launch due missing libnspr4.so; source-backed web status component verification plus focused/full test receipts are recorded in artifacts/g001-live-status-test-report.json.
Focused contract tests assert requestHqStatusRefresh ordering before weekly summary refresh; source inspection confirms summary failure isolation.
Source inspection and focused Biome/test/typecheck receipts for docs/spec alignment alongside implementation files.

adversarialCases.scenario: The HQ status endpoint returns non-OK or schema-invalid data.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The badge renders Status 확인 실패 instead of a stale hardcoded success badge.

adversarialCases.scenario: The backend returns a valid but unknown status string.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The badge renders the raw backend status rather than collapsing to static Focus copy.

adversarialCases.scenario: Production UI still contains Status Focus or 성과 미기록 1건 literals.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The stale literals appear only in negative test assertions, not production UI files.

adversarialCases.scenario: Performance POST succeeds but weekly summary refetch fails.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: requestHqStatusRefresh has already dispatched and the user sees saved-with-summary-refresh-failed copy rather than save failure.

adversarialCases.scenario: The content package selector is counted as a sixth metric field and violates the five-field metric constraint.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The spec separates content_package_id selector from required/optional metric fields and documents max_metric_fields: 5.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: delivery closure 78-G001DeliveryClosure found no blocking implementation defects; architect cleanup/review 85-G001ArchitectClear found no blocking cleanup/slop findings; executor QA 86-G001QaClear found zero blockers. Earlier architect findings about stale refresh ordering and doc drift were fixed, then the full loop reran cleanly. Verification passed focused Biome over touched files, focused tests (37 tests), full npm test (121 tests), typecheck, Prisma validate, and production audit. Team skill was attempted first with tmux team implement-ultragoal-g001-only-1687118d, but worker startup hit a provider model 404 and the team was cleanly shut down with phase=cancelled before native role-agent delegation completed the gate.
